title: sterculia stenocarpa
intro: Sterculia stenocarpa, also known as the Western Waratah or Queensland Starbur, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called sterculia seed oil. This oil has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including eczema, acne, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Sterculia stenocarpa is often used to create topical creams, ointments, and salves for skin conditions, as well as being made into teas for its internal health benefits.
